name: Drying Soy Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into strips that are 1/2 inch thick.
2. Combine the marinade ingredients in a large glass baking dish.
3. Add the beef strips to the marinade and cover. Refrigerate overnight.
4. Drain the beef slices.
5. Dry the beef slices in an electric dehydrator at 145°F until they become pliable.
6. Package the dried jerky in home canning jars, food-grade plastic bags, or seal-by-heat food storage bags.
